citation: 12 CFR §1026.43(b)(4) - Safe-Harbor first-lien high band tighter threshold (1.5 pp)
comment: Hand-calc: first-lien high band Safe-Harbor threshold = 1.5 pp (TIGHTER than 2.25 pp General-QM). apr=0.0640, apor=0.0500 -> spread = 1.40 pp <= 1.5 pp -> safe_harbor_qm_passes=True. Same loan would also pass General-QM (1.40 pp <= 2.25 pp). This fixture pins the second column lookup in the same YAML.
